message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should leave after 10:30
The train should depart from leicester and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
